Federated research view showing how records about Lorson Ranch housing delivery come from five different governmental jurisdictions, each authoritative for its own records, demonstrating the multi-jurisdictional federation in the schema.

research view · federated

Lorson Ranch housing delivery

Five jurisdictions, each authoritative for its own records, contributing to one research question. No single government holds the full picture.

research question

What is the relationship between metro district infrastructure financing and actual housing delivery in Lorson Ranch?

submitted by emma moore · pivot true north · public-interest research
jurisdictions
5
records found
23,318
cross-refs
14
action needed
3
intergovernmental authority
Pikes Peak Regional Building Department
us-co-pprbd
authoritative
authoritative for residential and commercial building permits across seven member jurisdictions including unincorporated el paso county.
residential permit export · 2020 to present23,281 records
certificate of occupancy datapending
full-jurisdiction expanded exportin progress
via cora response · tim hagan · 2026-04-13
county government · assessor
El Paso County Assessor
us-co-el-paso-county
authoritative
authoritative for parcel boundaries, schedule numbers, ownership records, and assessed valuations across the county.
parcel shapefile · lorson ranch boundaryavailable
schedule number ↔ permit linkagevia pprbd
via county gis · public download
county government · commissioners
El Paso County Board of County Commissioners
us-co-el-paso-county-bocc
authoritative
authoritative for the resolutions that originally approved the lorson ranch metro districts and any subsequent amendments.
service plan approval resolutions (md 1-7)7 records
amendment resolutionsaction needed
via bocc agenda archive · cora possible
special districts · seven entities
Lorson Ranch Metropolitan Districts 1–7
us-co-lorson-ranch-md-1 through us-co-lorson-ranch-md-7
authoritative
each district is authoritative for its own service plan, budget, board minutes, and bond filings. seven separate jurisdictions sharing the lorson ranch development name.
service plans (one per district)7 expected
annual budget filingsvia dola
bond issuance recordsaction needed
board meeting minutesaction needed
via dola filings · district websites
state agency
Colorado Department of Local Affairs
us-co-dola
authoritative
authoritative for special district registrations, annual budgets, audit filings, and oversight of title 32 districts statewide.
district registration records (md 1-7)7 records
annual budget filings · 2020-present42 records
audit exemption / audit filings28 records
via dola.colorado.gov public portal

how the records connect

cross-references the schema makes explicit
a pprbd permit references a county parcel via schedule number
a county parcel sits within a metro district boundary
a metro district was created by a county commissioners resolution
a metro district files annual budgets with dola
dola audit data reveals district financial health
no single jurisdiction holds the whole story. the schema's cross-reference type makes the connections traversable while preserving each source's authority over its own records.
